name: France
description: Les Bleus are two-time World Cup champions (1998, 2018) and boast one of the most talented squads in international football. Guided by veteran coach Didier Deschamps, France enter World Cup 2026 as firm favourites.

name: Brazil
description: The most decorated nation in World Cup history with five titles, Brazil arrive at the 2026 tournament seeking a sixth. With Vinicius Jr. leading a dynamic attack, A Seleção blend flair and tenacity under coach Dorival Júnior.

name: Morocco
description: Africa's finest, Morocco stunned the world by reaching the 2022 World Cup semi-finals. Coach Walid Regragui has built a compact, relentless side that is expected to challenge even further in 2026.

name: Argentina
description: Reigning world champions Argentina, led by the iconic Lionel Messi, return to defend their crown. Under Scaloni's disciplined system, La Albiceleste combine tactical solidity with world-class individual quality.

name: United States
description: Co-hosts of the 2026 World Cup, the USA enter with enormous expectation on home soil. With Christian Pulisic leading a young, ambitious squad and Mauricio Pochettino at the helm, this could be a breakthrough tournament.

name: Spain
description: Euro 2024 champions Spain carry serious momentum into 2026. De la Fuente has refreshed La Roja with a new generation of talent — headlined by midfielder Pedri — while retaining the fluid, possession-based identity Spain are famous for.
